name: Father Cairns Park
description: Father Cairns Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Monroe, MI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water.
hours: 6 AM – 10 PM. name: Francis Family YMCA
description: Francis Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Temperance, MI. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, and trainers or lessons.

name: manor park
description: manor park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Monroe, MI. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.
hours: 6 AM – 10 PM. name: Monroe Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Monroe Family YMCA in Monroe, MI! There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to food and restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: White Park
description: Come play pickleball at White Park in Temperance, MI! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Wolverine Park
description: Wolverine Park is a place to play pickleball in Dundee, MI. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
